hypothesis: Increase num_leaves from 256 to 512 to allow even more complex feature interactions. exp_0027 showed that increasing num_leaves from 128 to 256 improved WRMSSE from 0.94711 to 0.94675. Testing if further increasing to 512 continues this trend. To avoid overfitting with more leaves, also increase min_child_samples from 50 to 100 and increase lambda_l2 from 0.1 to 0.5 for stronger regularization. All other settings unchanged from exp_0027.
